headline: Brookfield Stake Reshapes Duke Energy Florida Growth And Investor Outlook
summary: Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) has completed a minority investment transaction involving Duke Energy Florida. Brookfield has acquired a 9.2% stake in Duke Energy Florida as part of this transaction. The deal represents the first stage of a broader partnership intended to support infrastructure growth in Florida. Duke Energy, through its regulated utility operations, supplies electricity to customers in several U.S. regions, including Florida. The Brookfield investment in Duke Energy Florida...
